jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Stryker India
jsonLd.description:
Stryker India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Stryker India:
Stryker India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
